

## Plan: Add "Generated by SiteLog" Text Footer to Every PDF Page

### Single File Change

**File:** `supabase/functions/generate-report/index.ts` — `generatePdfBytes` function only

### Changes

1. **Add Helvetica font object** (Type1 built-in, no file needed) — new PDF object `/F2` for the footer text

2. **Reduce usable body height** — subtract ~30pt from `usableHeight` so body text never collides with the footer zone

3. **Render footer on every page** — in the existing per-page loop, after the body text `ET`, append:
   - `BT /F2 7 Tf 0.6 0.6 0.6 rg` (7pt Helvetica, ~60% gray)
   - Position at approximately `x = pageWidth - 140, y = 16` (bottom-right with safe margins)
   - `(Generated by SiteLog) Tj ET`

4. **Update page Resources** — each page's Resources dictionary gets `/Font << /F1 [Courier ref] /F2 [Helvetica ref] >>`

5. **Adjust object ID arithmetic** — adding the Helvetica font object shifts all subsequent object IDs by 1 (font obj at ID 4, pages start at ID 5)

### What Does NOT Change
- Report content, AI prompts, transcription logic
- PDF filename, storage path, upload flow
- Database writes (`daily_reports`, `admin_reports`)
- Frontend code
- Core pagination logic (same `linesPerPage` formula, just with reduced usable height)

### Testing
- Deploy the updated edge function
- Invoke with a short report (1 page) and a longer report (multi-page)
- Verify footer placement, no content overlap, and successful storage upload
